message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Please update pipeline in TEAM_AGREEMENTS.md">
Carson — one more task. Please update the Atomic Green Step pipeline in TEAM_AGREEMENTS.md (the "Commit Discipline" section) to reorder consensus BEFORE push. The updated pipeline:

1. Write code
2. cargo fmt --check
3. cargo clippy -- -D warnings
4. cargo test
5. git commit (locally, do NOT push)
6. All 9 agents review and reach consensus
7. If concerns → fix, re-run 2-5, re-seek consensus
8. Once 9/9 → git push
9. gh run list --limit 1 — verify CI green
10. Only then begin next task

Commit locally and message me when ready for consensus. Do NOT push until we have 9/9.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
Already done. The TEAM_AGREEMENTS.md update is committed locally (0f9ea09) and waiting for 9/9 consensus. I sent the details in my previous message.

The pipeline section at lines 475-496 has been updated with exactly the flow you described. Ready for review.
